strategy: Team fight (17,140 health, two Arcane Toads). The fight is school-gated: each action type is allowed only for certain schools, and off-school actions get you hit by a Tier 5 minion. Match casters to allowed schools (blades: Storm/Death/Life; shields: Ice/Myth/Death; traps: Myth/Fire/Ice; DoTs: Fire/Myth/Life; heals: Life/Storm/Fire; pip spells: Balance).
The kill clock is his GROWTH charms: he adds one Balanceblade GROWTH to himself each round after round 2, and at 3 GROWTH charms he wipes the team for 1,000,000 damage.

Exploit the healing cheat: any heal you cast makes him Enfeeble himself, removing all his charms including the GROWTH stacks, and Cleanse Wards the target, clearing Nightmare Prone marks. Use a heal to reset his GROWTH before it reaches 3.
Watch the Nightmare Prone stun marks (round 1 and every fourth round). A marked wizard gets hit at end of round; Cleanse Ward removes the mark, or the healing cheat clears it.
Do not cast All-Allies spells (Equalize caps your damage at 3,000), and mind the toad limits: 3+ helpful charms draws Banshee, 3+ traps on an enemy draws Immolate.
Set up within the school rules, keep GROWTH cleared with heals, and burst him down between resets.
cheatNotes: Round 1 he puts a Dispel of your own school on each wizard and a Nightmare Prone stun mark on a random one.
Each round after round 2 he adds a Balanceblade GROWTH to himself and re-Dispels every wizard.
He skips that GROWTH cast if a GROWTH charm was cleared off him the previous turn.
At 3 GROWTH charms he ends the round with Call of Khrulhu for 1,000,000 damage to all wizards.

Any heal (spell, heal charm, heal global, or outgoing-heal aura) makes him Enfeeble off all his own charms and Cleanse Ward all wards off the target. Use it to strip his GROWTH and clear Nightmare marks.
Casting an All-Allies spell makes him Equalize the damage cap down to 3,000.
A helpful charm from a non-Storm/Death/Life wizard draws Ice Wyvern on the receiver.
A harmful charm from a non-Death/Storm/Ice wizard draws Stone Colossus on the caster.
A helpful ward from a non-Ice/Myth/Death wizard draws Helephant on the receiver.
A harmful ward from a non-Myth/Fire/Ice wizard draws Centaur on the caster.
A DoT from a non-Fire/Myth/Life wizard draws Stormzilla on the caster.
A HoT from a non-Life/Storm/Fire wizard draws Skeletal Pirate on the receiver.
A pip-manipulation spell from a non-Balance wizard draws Mana Burn on the receiver.
A wizard holding 3+ helpful charms gets Banshee from the Star-Storm toad.
An enemy holding 3+ harmful wards gets its caster hit with Immolate.
Targeting Freddie or using an All-Enemies spell makes the toad give every wizard a Living Nightmare card.
Round 1 and end of every fourth round, the Moon-Storm toad casts Smoke Screen and marks a random wizard Nightmare Prone.
Cleanse Ward removes the Nightmare Prone mark.
End of each round, a marked wizard gets hit with one of the toad's listed nightmare spells.
